name: Airbnb
interviewFormat: 5+ rounds: technical screen, 2 coding, 1 system design, 1 cross-functional, 1 culture/values (extensive — 'belong anywhere')
questionPatterns: design Airbnb's search and ranking system
design a booking / reservation system with availability conflicts
design a pricing recommendation engine for hosts
tell me about a time you built something that genuinely helped people
how would you handle a trust and safety incident at scale
redFlags: purely mercenary motivation with no mission alignment
no empathy for hosts or guests
